nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Input audio block (any channel count up to 8)

nodes.label: Channel dispatch
nodes.description: forwardToFrame16 switches on runtime channel count (1-8)

nodes.label: Per-sample iteration
nodes.description: FrameProcessor interleaves all channels into span<float, C> per sample

nodes.label: Serial child processFrame
nodes.description: Children process one interleaved frame at a time
